Accepting new clients!

Please note: We are hiring Veterinarians and Veterinary Externs

Career Application Form

We are looking for a friendly, motivated professional who works well with fellow team members in a fast-paced environment.

We’re Excited to See You

St. John Animal Clinic recognizes the valuable bond between humans and animals and is dedicated to making a difference by providing superior veterinary care through education, communication, and preventative medicine. For general information, questions, and appointment requests, click the below button.

Book Appointment


Contact info

Phone: (219)-365-8531
Email:contact@stjohnanimalclinic.com


Address

8661 Wicker Ave.
St. John, IN 46373



Hours

Mon & Wed: 7:30am – 6:00pm
Tue & Thu: 9:00am – 6:00pm
Fri: 7:30am – 5:00pm
Sat: 7:30am-  12:00pm
Sun & Holidays: Closed


Have a Question?

Please fill out our online form and we will respond as soon as possible.



We Proudly Serve Pets of St. John, IN, and Beyond

We proudly serve the pets of St. John, Dyer, Schererville, Crown Point, Munster, Highland, Cedar Lake, Griffith, Hammond, Merrillville, IN, as well as Crete, Beecher, Lansing, and Chicago, IL.

© 2026 St. John Animal Clinic | Powered by PetDesk | Privacy Policy | Accessibility Statement
